DISCOVERY 612, TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED AS MODIFIED: PLAINTIFF SHARON BRIDGEWATER'S MOTION FOR DISCOVERY OF DEFENDANT'S FINANCIAL CONDITION IS DENIED. THE FIRST DATE THIS MOTION COULD BE HEARD IS FEBRUARY 9, 2009. THERE IS NO SHOWING THAT THERE IS A SUBSTANTIAL PROBABILITY THAT PLAINTIFF WILL PREVAIL ON HER CLAIM OF PUNITIVE DAMAGES. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
